\tzpentry{ID4718}{Curvature Expectation Value}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4718 introduces Curvature Expectation Value as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\nR_{$\\mu$\\nu} - \\tfrac{1}{2}R\\,g_{$\\mu$\\nu} + \\Lambda_{\\text{eff}}(r)\\,g_{$\\mu$\\nu} = \\frac{8\\pi G}{c^4}\\,\\langle T_{$\\mu$\\nu}\\rangle_{\\text{TZP}},\n\\]
